description_long: This is a large, green John Deere combine harvester with a robust, angular body and a high-mounted operator cabin. The vehicle features four large, rugged tires with deep treads for traction on rough terrain, and a prominent unloading auger extending from one side. The front section includes a wide header for crop collection, while the rear is boxy and houses the grain tank. The cabin is enclosed with glass windows, providing visibility and protection for the operator. The exterior is primarily metallic with some plastic and rubber components, and the surface shows a glossy finish with visible dirt on the wheels.
description: A large, green John Deere combine harvester with an enclosed glass cabin, four rugged tires, and a side-mounted unloading auger.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide header, central cabin, and large front tires.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the unloading auger, grain tank, and access ladder.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the boxy grain tank, rear tires, and rear access features.
description_view_3: Right side view with visible cabin windows, header, and the opposite side of the auger.
attribute_wheel_configuration: Four large wheels, rear wheels slightly larger; likely four-wheel drive.
attribute_cabin_design: Enclosed cabin with glass windows, protective structure, and ergonomic operator access.
